steps.title: Isolate the reciprocal
steps.content:
Start with the given equation and add the subtracted terms to both sides.
$$\frac{24}{p}=\frac{24}{q}-\frac{24}{r}-\frac{24}{s}$$
$$\frac{24}{q}=\frac{24}{p}+\frac{24}{r}+\frac{24}{s}$$

steps.title: Combine and invert
steps.content:
Use common denominator $prs$, then take reciprocals.
$$\frac{1}{q}=\frac{rs+ps+pr}{prs}$$
$$q=\frac{prs}{pr+ps+rs}$$
The answer is C.
